hooks.command: filepath=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty') && if [ -n "$filepath" ]; then ext="${filepath##*.}"; case "$ext" in js|jsx|ts|tsx|mjs|cjs) npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; py) python3 -m ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || python3 -m black "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; go) gofmt -w "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; rs) rustfmt "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi
